query:
-- Insert Beginner Path
INSERT INTO learning_paths (name, description, goal, duration, level, icon, colorTheme, displayOrder, isActive)
VALUES (
  'New Believer Foundation',
  'Perfect for new believers or those seeking to strengthen their biblical foundation',
  'Build a solid understanding of Scripture and basic Christian doctrine',
  '3-4 months',
  'beginner',
  'GraduationCap',
  'blue',
  1,
  true
);

-- Insert Intermediate Path
INSERT INTO learning_paths (name, description, goal, duration, level, icon, colorTheme, displayOrder, isActive)
VALUES (
  'Ministry Preparation Track',
  'Comprehensive preparation for those called to ministry leadership',
  'Develop essential skills and knowledge for effective ministry leadership',
  '6-8 months',
  'intermediate',
  'Briefcase',
  'purple',
  2,
  true
);

-- Insert Advanced Path
INSERT INTO learning_paths (name, description, goal, duration, level, icon, colorTheme, displayOrder, isActive)
VALUES (
  'Advanced Theological Studies',
  'Deep dive into systematic theology, apologetics, and advanced biblical studies',
  'Master advanced theological concepts and develop scholarly understanding of Scripture',
  '8-12 months',
  'advanced',
  'BookOpen',
  'gold',
  3,
  true
);
